      - how-it-works: understanding mechanisms
      - why-it-exists: purpose or rationale
      - what-changed: modifications made
      - problem-solution: issues and their fixes

      - pattern: reusable approach

attachment.content:
- deep-research: Deep research harness — fan-out web searches, fetch sources, adversarially verify claims, synthesize a cited report. - When the user wants a deep, multi-source, fact-checked research report on any topic. BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., "what car to buy" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2-3 clarifying questions to narrow scope. Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings; ultra: deep multi-agent review in the cloud). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled cloud agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring cloud agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.
TRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it "looks like a one-liner" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Fable, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).
SKIP only when another provider is being worked on (overrides all triggers): OpenAI/GPT/Gemini/Llama/Mistral/Cohere/Ollama named in the query; OR `grep -rE 'openai|langchain_openai|google.generativeai|genai|mistralai|cohere|ollama'` over the project hits (run this grep FIRST if no provider named — don't Read the file).
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). content.thinking:
This is a significant finding! The Excel file actually contains multiple drawing files with many images:
- drawing1.xml: 1 image
- drawing2.xml: 22 images (this is likely sheet 2 - "1. 設計重點")
- drawing3.xml: 14 images (this should be sheet 3 - "2. 基本規格" - the problematic sheet!)
- drawing4.xml: 12 images
- drawing5.xml: 5 images

And there are 66 total media files in the Excel.

But the metadata only recorded 1 image for the 基本規格 sheet. This means the image extraction code is failing to detect most of the images in that worksheet, even though drawing3.xml contains 14 images!

This is a critical discovery - the Excel file DOES contain the images, but the extraction process is only finding 1 out of 14.

content.thinking:
This is a critical discovery! Sheet3 (基本規格) has 10 cells with vm= attributes (rich value metadata), which indicates 10 images stored as rich values in cells B47, B52, B57, B62, B67, B72, B77, B87, B92, B97.

These are the missing images! They're not stored as drawing objects but as Excel rich values (a newer feature in Excel for embedding images directly in cells). The richValueRel.xml shows 20 image relationships total, and sheet3 has 10 of them.

The current extraction code only handles drawing-based images, not rich value images. This explains why only 1 image (from drawing1.xml) was extracted, while the other 10 images (stored as rich values) were missed.

content.text:
<observation>
  <type>discovery</type>
  <title>Missing images are stored as Excel rich values, not drawings</title>
  <subtitle>Sheet3 基本規格 has 10 images embedded as rich value metadata in cells, currently not extracted</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>Sheet3 has 10 cells with vm= attributes indicating rich value images at B47, B52, B57, B62, B67, B72, B77, B87, B92, B97</fact>
    <fact>Rich value images are mapped through xl/richData/richValueRel.xml to 20 media files (image1.png through image20.png)</fact>
    <fact>Current extraction code only processes drawing-based images, not rich value images</fact>
    <fact>Sheet6 (符號設計、介面說明) also has 19 rich value images that would be missed</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Root cause identified: the missing images in 基本規格 sheet are stored using Excel's rich value feature, a modern format for embedding images directly into cells. Sheet3 contains 10 rich value images in cells B47, B52, B57, B62, B67, B72, B77, B87, B92, and B97, linked through the richData/richValueRel.xml relationship file to media files. The current image extraction logic only handles traditional drawing-based images (from xl/drawings/*.xml) and completely ignores rich value images, causing these 10 images to be skipped during metadata generation. To fix this, the extraction code needs to be enhanced to also parse cells with vm= attributes and resolve their image references through the richData relationship chain.</narrative>

content.thinking:
This shows the valueMetadata mapping structure. It maps vm= values (0-19) to rich value indices. The chain is:
1. Cell has vm="1" attribute
2. valueMetadata index 1 -> richValue index 1
3. richValue index 1 -> richValueRel rId
4. richValueRel rId -> media file

So the extraction code needs to follow this chain to get the actual image files.

content.text:
<observation>
  <type>discovery</type>
  <title>Rich value image extraction requires 4-level lookup chain</title>
  <subtitle>vm attribute → valueMetadata → richValue → richValueRel → media file path</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>valueMetadata.xml maps 20 vm indices (0-19) to richValue indices with 1:1 correspondence</fact>
    <fact>Cell with vm="1" resolves through valueMetadata[1] → richValue[1] → richValueRel rId2 → media/image2.png</fact>
    <fact>Complete extraction chain requires parsing 4 XML files: worksheet, metadata.xml, rdrichvalue.xml, richValueRel.xml.rels</fact>
    <fact>All 20 rich value entries map to image type (t="1") in valueMetadata</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>The rich value image extraction requires a complex 4-level lookup chain. When a cell has a vm="1" attribute, the extractor must: (1) read xl/metadata.xml to map vm index to richValue index, (2) read xl/richData/rdrichvalue.xml to get the relationship ID, (3) read xl/richData/_rels/richValueRel.xml.rels to resolve the rId to a media file path, and (4) extract the actual image file. The current extraction code lacks this entire lookup chain, explaining why all rich value images are missing from the output. To fix the bug, the extraction logic must be extended to detect vm= attributes in cells and follow this multi-file resolution path to retrieve the corresponding media files.</narrative>

    <concept>pattern</concept>

twoCellAnchor/oneCellAnchor 用 <xdr:from> 的 col/row（0-based）轉 A1；\\n    absoluteAnchor 無 from（絕對座標 EMU，無法可靠對回 cell）→ 回傳 '(absolute)'。\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    from_el = anchor_el.find(\\\"xdr:from\\\",          col = int(col_el.text)  # 0-based\\n            row = int(row_el.text)  # 0-based\\n            return get_column_letter(col + 1) + str(row + 1)\\n    return \\\"(absolute)\\\"\\n\\n\\ndef openpyxl.load_workbook(xlsx_path, data_only=True)\\n    merges = []\\n    for ws in wb.worksheets:\\n        for merge_range in ws.merged_cells.ranges:\\n            # 取合併區左上角的值當 header（data_only 模式可直接讀值）\\n            min_row, min_col = merge_range.min_row, merge_range.min_col\\n            top_left = ws.cell(row=min_row, column=min_col).value\\n            header = str(top_left).strip() if top_left is not None else None\\n            merges.append({\\n                \\\"sheet\\\": ws.title,\\n                \\\"range\\\": str(merge_range),\\n                \\\"header\\\": header or None,  # 空字串正規化為 None\\n            })\\n    wb.close()\\n    return merges\\n\\n\\ndef _annotate_merged_range(images: list[dict], merges: list[dict]) -> None:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"原地標註：若圖片錨點 cell 落在某合併範圍內，填入該 range 字串。\\n    absoluteAnchor 的 cell='(absolute)' 無法解析座標 → 跳過（保持 None）。\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    # 按 sheet 建索引：[(min_col, min_row, max_col, max_row, range_str)]\\n    by_sheet: dict[str, (min_col, min_row, max_col, max_row, m[\\\"range\\\"])\\n        )\\n\\n    for img in images:\\n        try:\\n            row, col = coordinate_to_tuple(img[\\\"cell\\\"])  # (row, col)\\n <= row <= max_row and min_col <= col <= max_col:\\n                img[\\\"merged_range\\\"] = rng\\n                break\\n\\n\\ndef _build_cell_list(ws) -> list[str]:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"把一張 sheet 字串；覆蓋格集合（理論無值，保險跳過）\\n    merge_topleft = {}\\n    covered = set()\\n    for rng in ws.merged_cells.ranges:\\n        merge_topleft[(rng.min_row, rng.min_col)] = str(rng)\\n        for r in c))\\n\\n    lines = []\\n    for row in ws.iter_rows():\\n        for cell in row:\\n            if cell.value is None:\\n                continue\\n            val = str(cell.value).strip()\\n * ws.max_column\\n        if total <= 0:\\n            continue\\n        nonempty = sum(1 for row in ws.iter_rows() for c in row if c.value is not None)\\n        if nonempty / total < str:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"把稀疏 sheet 的 NaN 表（MarkItDown 輸出）替換成 cell 清單；密集 sheet 原樣保留。\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    lines = md_text.split(\\\"\\\\n\\\")\\n    out = []\\n    title = None\\n    body = []\\n\\n    def flush():\\n        if title is not None and title in cell_lists:\\n            cl = cell_lists[title]\\n            out.append(\\\"\\\")\\n            out.extend(cl if cl else [\\\"（此工作表無儲存格內容）\\\"])\\n            out.append(\\\"\\\")\\n        else:\\n            out.extend(body)\\n\\n    for line in lines:\\n        m = re.match(r\\\"^##\\\\s+(.+)\\\", line)\\n        if m:\\n            flush()\\n            body = []\\n            title = m.group(1).strip()\\n            out.append(line)\\n        elif title is None:\\n            out.append(line)  # \\\"\\\"\\\"主轉換函式\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    xlsx_path = Path(xlsx_path)\\n    if not xlsx_path.exists():\\n        print(f\\\"錯誤：找不到 {xlsx_path}\\\")\\n        sys.exit(1)\\n\\n    # 輸出目錄\\n    if output_dir is None:\\n        output_dir = Path.cwd() / \\\"output\\\" / xlsx_path.stem\\n    output_dir = Path(output_dir)\\n\\n    md_dir = output_dir / \\\"markdown\\\"\\n    img_dir = output_dir / \\\"images\\\"\\n    meta_dir = output_dir / \\\"metadata\\\"\\n    src_dir = output_dir / \\\"source\\\"\\n    for d in (md_dir, img_dir, meta_dir, src_dir):\\n        d.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\\n\\n    # 重產前清空 images/，杜絕來源改名/增刪時殘留的孤兒舊圖\\n    for old in img_dir.iterdir():\\n        if old.is_file():\\n            old.unlink()\\n\\n    print(f\\\"轉換：{xlsx_path.name}\\\")\\n    print(f\\\"輸出：{output_dir}\\\")\\n\\n    # 1. 複製原始檔（來源==目的時跳過，避免 copy-to-self 的 PermissionError）\\n    dst_src = src_dir / xlsx_path.name\\n    if xlsx_path.resolve() != dst_src.resolve():\\n        shutil.copy2(xlsx_path, dst_src)\\n        print(\\\"[OK] 原始檔已複製\\\")\\n    else:\\n        print(\\\"[OK] 來源即輸出位置，跳過複製\\\")\\n\\n    # 2. MarkItDown 抽文字/表格\\n    print(\\\"  抽取文字/表格（MarkItDown）...\\\")\\n    mit = MarkItDown()\\n    result = mit.convert(str(xlsx_path))\\n    md_text = result.text_content\\n    print(f\\\"[OK] 文字抽取完成（{len(md_text)} 字元）\\\")\\n\\n    # 產生易讀檔名：sheet_cell_原始檔名（cell 可能含括號如 (absolute)，一併淨化）\\n                orig_name = Path(zip_img_path).name\\n                safe_sheet = re.sub(r'[^\\\\w\\\\-]', '_', img_info[\\\"sheet\\\"])\\n                safe_cell = re.sub(r'[^\\\\w\\\\-]', '_', img_info[\\\"cell\\\"])\\n                out_name = f\\\"{safe_sheet}_{safe_cell}_{orig_name}\\\"\\n                out_path = img_dir / out_name\\n                with z.open(zip_img_path) as src, open(out_path, \\\"wb\\\") as dst:\\n                    dst.write(src.read())\\n                extracted_images.append({\\n                    \\\"sheet\\\": img_info[\\\"sheet\\\"],\\n                    \\\"cell\\\": img_info[\\\"cell\\\"],\\n                    \\\"merged_range\\\": None,   # 由 _annotate_merged_range 補上\\n                    \\\"image\\\": f\\\"images/{out_name}\\\",\\n                    \\\"description\\\": None,    # 選用檢索提示（§9），預設留空\\n                })\\n\\n    print(f\\\"[OK] 已匯出 {len(extracted_images)} 張圖片\\\")\\n\\n    # 4. 合併儲存格\\n    print(\\\"  讀取合併儲存格...\\\")\\n    merges = get_merged_cells(xlsx_path)\\n    print(f\\\"[OK] 找到 {len(merges)} 個合併範圍\\\")\\n\\n    # 4.5 為圖片標註其錨點所在的合併範圍（若有）\\n    _annotate_merged_range(extracted_images, merges)\\n\\n    # 6. 產生 metadata.json\\n    metadata = {\\n        \\\"source\\\": xlsx_path.name,\\n        \\\"images\\\": extracted_images,\\n        \\\"shapes\\\": shape_texts,\\n        \\\"merges\\\": merges,\\n    }\\n    meta_file = meta_dir / \\\"metadata.json\\\"\\n    meta_file.write_text(json.dumps(metadata, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding=\\\"utf-8\\\")\\n    print(\\\"[OK] metadata.json 已產生\\\")\\n\\n    print(f\\\"\\\\n完成！輸出在 {output_dir}\\\")\\n    return output_dir\\n\\n\\ndef _inject_image_placeholders(md_text: str, images: list[dict],\\n                               shapes: list[dict] = None) -> str:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"在 Markdown 各 sheet 段落後注入圖片佔位符 + 圖形文字標註區塊\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    shapes = shapes or []\\n    if not images and not shapes:\\n        return md_text\\n\\n    # 4.6 抽取疊在工作表上的圖形文字標註（callout）\\n    print(\\\"  抽取圖形文字標註（shape/連接線）...\\\")\\n    shape_texts = extract_shape_texts(xlsx_path)\\n    print(f\\\"[OK] 找到 {len(shape_texts)} 筆圖形文字標註\\\")\\n\\n    # 4.7 稀疏文件型 sheet：用 cell 清單取代 NaN 灌爆的表（密度閘門）\\n    print(\\\"  重建稀疏工作表（cell 清單取代 NaN 表）...\\\")\\n    cell_lists = build_sheet_cell_lists(xlsx_path)\\n    md_text = _replace_sparse_tables(md_text, cell_lists)\\n    print(f\\\"[OK] 重建 {len(cell_lists)} 個稀疏工作表\\\")\\n\\n    # 5. 在 Markdown 內嵌圖片佔位符 + 圖形文字標註\\n    md_with_images = _inject_image_placeholders(md_text, extracted_images, shape_texts)\\n\\n    # 寫出 .md\\n    md_file = md_dir / (xlsx_path.stem + \\\".md\\\")\\n    md_file.write_text(md_with_images, encoding=\\\"utf-8\\\")\\n    print(f\\\"[OK] Markdown 已寫入：{md_file.name}\\\")\\n\\n    # 6. 產生 metadata.json\\n    metadata = {\\n        \\\"source\\\": xlsx_path.name,\\n        \\\"images\\\": extracted_images,\\n        \\\"shapes\\\": shape_texts,\\n        \\\"merges\\\": merges,\\n    }\\n    meta_file = meta_dir / \\\"metadata.json\\\"\\n    meta_file.write_text(json.dumps(metadata, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding=\\\"utf-8\\\")\\n    print(\\\"[OK] metadata.json 已產生\\\")\\n\\n    print(f\\\"\\\\n完成！輸出在 {output_dir}\\\")\\n    return output_dir\\n\\n\\ndef _inject_image_placeholders(md_text: str, images: list[dict],\\n                               shapes: list[dict] = None) -> str:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"在 Markdown 各 sheet 段落後注入圖片佔位符 + 圖形文字標註區塊\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    shapes = shapes or []\\n    if not images and not shapes:\\n        return md_text\\n\\n    # 按 sheet 分組\\n    img_by_sheet: dict[str, list[dict]] = {}\\n    for img in images:\\n        img_by_sheet.setdefault(img[\\\"sheet\\\"], []).append(img)\\n    shp_by_sheet: dict[str, list[dict]] = {}\\n    for s in shapes:\\n        shp_by_sheet.setdefault(s[\\\"sheet\\\"], []).append(s)\\n\\n    # 在每個 sheet 標題段落後（下個標題前）插入該 sheet 的圖片+標註\\n    lines = md_text.split(\\\"\\\\n\\\")\\n    output_lines = []\\n    pending_sheet = None\\n\\n    for line in lines:\\n        sheet_match = re.match(r\\\"^##\\\\s+(.+)\\\", line)\\n        if sheet_match:\\n            if pending_sheet is not None:\\n                output_lines.extend(_format_sheet_extras(\\n                    img_by_sheet.get(pending_sheet), shp_by_sheet.get(pending_sheet)))\\n            pending_sheet = sheet_match.group(1).strip()\\n        output_lines.append(line)\\n\\n    # flush 最後一個 sheet\\n    if pending_sheet is not None:\\n        output_lines.extend(_format_sheet_extras(\\n            img_by_sheet.get(pending_sheet), shp_by_sheet.get(pending_sheet)))\\n\\n    # 沒匹配到任何標題的 sheet，內容附在最後\\n    matched = set()\\n    for line in output_lines:\\n        m = re.match(r\\\"^##\\\\s+(.+)\\\", line)\\n        if m:\\n            matched.add(m.group(1).strip())\\n\\n    unmatched_imgs = [i for s, lst in img_by_sheet.items() if s not in matched for i in lst]\\n    unmatched_shps = [x for s, lst in shp_by_sheet.items() if s not in matched for x in lst]\\n    if unmatched_imgs or unmatched_shps:\\n        output_lines.append(\\\"\\\")\\n        output_lines.append(\\\"## 未匹配工作表內容\\\")\\n        output_lines.extend(_format_sheet_extras(unmatched_imgs, unmatched_shps))\\n\\n    return \\\"\\\\n\\\".join(output_lines)\\n\\n\\ndef _format_sheet_extras(images: list[dict], shapes: list[dict]) -> list[str]:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"格式化單一 sheet 的圖片區 + 圖形文字標註區為 Markdown 行\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    lines = []\\n    if images:\\n        lines += [\\\"\\\", \\\"### 本工作表圖片\\\", \\\"\\\"]\\n        for img in images:\\n            name = Path(img[\\\"image\\\"]).stem\\n            lines.append(f'- **[{img[\\\"cell\\\"]}]** {name} — ![{name}]({img[\\\"image\\\"]})')\\n    if shapes:\\n        lines += [\\\"\\\", \\\"### 本工作表標註（圖形文字）\\\", \\\"\\\"]\\n        for s in shapes:\\n            lines.append(f'- **[{s[\\\"cell\\\"]}]** {s[\\\"text\\\"]}')\\n    if lines:\\n        lines.append(\\\"\\\")\\n    return lines\\n\\n\\nif __name__ == \\\"__main__\\\":\\n    if len(sys.argv) < 2:\\n        print(\\\"用法：python convert.py <excel檔案路徑> [輸出目錄]\\\")\\n        sys.exit(1)\\n    xlsx = sys.argv[1]\\n    out = sys.argv[2] if len(sys.argv) > 2 else None\\n    convert(xlsx, out)\\n\",\"numLines\":500,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":500}}"</outcome>

content.thinking:
This is important - it shows the structure of the rich value data. Each `<rv s="0">` element has two `<v>` values:
- First <v> is the LocalImageIdentifier (0-19) which maps to the rId in richValueRel.xml.rels
- Second <v> is CalcOrigin (always 5 in this case)

So the mapping chain is:
1. Cell has vm="1" attribute → index into valueMetadata
2. valueMetadata[1] → richValue index 1
3. rdrichvalue.xml entry 1 → <rv s="0"><v>1</v><v>5</v></rv> → LocalImageIdentifier = 1
4. richValueRel.xml entry 1 → rId2
5. richValueRel.xml.rels rId2 → ../media/image2.png

This clarifies the complete extraction logic needed.

<observation>
  <type>discovery</type>
  <title>Rich value structure maps vm index to LocalImageIdentifier for media lookup</title>
  <subtitle>Each rich value contains LocalImageIdentifier (first v element) linking to richValueRel rId</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>rdrichvaluestructure.xml defines _localImage type with _rvRel:LocalImageIdentifier key</fact>
    <fact>rdrichvalue.xml contains 20 entries, each with two values: LocalImageIdentifier (0-19) and CalcOrigin (5)</fact>
    <fact>LocalImageIdentifier maps directly to richValueRel index: vm=1 → richValue[1] → LocalImageIdentifier=1 → rId2 → image2.png</fact>
    <fact>All 20 rich values use structure s="0" (_localImage type)</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Complete rich value image extraction logic now understood. The rdrichvalue.xml file contains 20 entries where each <rv> element has two <v> child elements: the first is the LocalImageIdentifier (0-19) that maps to the corresponding rId in richValueRel.xml, and the second is CalcOrigin (always 5). The extraction algorithm must: parse cells with vm= attributes, use the vm index to look up the corresponding <rv> entry in rdrichvalue.xml, extract the first <v> value as LocalImageIdentifier, construct the rId string (rId + LocalImageIdentifier + 1), resolve that rId through richValueRel.xml.rels to get the media path, and finally extract the image file. This provides the complete specification needed to implement rich value image extraction.</narrative>

A. 結構：structure index -> LocalImageIdentifier 欄位序\\n        struct_root = ET.fromstring(z.read(\\\"xl/richData/rdrichvaluestructure.xml\\\").decode(\\\"utf-8\\\"))\\n        local_img_field = {}\\n        for s_idx, s in enumerate(struct_root):\\n            for k_idx, k in enumerate(s):\\n                if k.get(\\\"n\\\") == \\\"_rvRel:LocalImageIdentifier\\\":\\n                    local_img_field[s_idx] = k_idx\\n                    break\\n\\n        # B. rich value index -> richValueRel 位置\\n        rv_root = ET.fromstring(z.read(\\\"xl/richData/rdrichvalue.xml\\\").decode(\\\"utf-8\\\"))\\n        rv_to_relpos = {}\\n        for rv_idx, rv in enumerate(rv_root):\\n            s_idx = int(rv.get(\\\"s\\\", -1))\\n            if s_idx not in local_img_field:\\n                continue\\n            vs = [c for c in rv if local(c) == \\\"v\\\"]\\n            fi = local_img_field[s_idx]\\n            if fi < len(vs) and vs[fi].text is not None:\\n                rv_to_relpos[rv_idx] = int(vs[fi].text)\\n\\n        # C. rel 位置 -> rId\\n        rvr_root = ET.fromstring(z.read(\\\"xl/richData/richValueRel.xml\\\").decode(\\\"utf-8\\\"))\\n        relpos_to_rid = {p: rel.get(R_NS + \\\"id\\\") for p, rel in enumerate(rvr_root)}\\n\\n        # D. rId -> media\\n        rels_root = ET.fromstring(z.read(\\\"xl/richData/_rels/richValueRel.xml.rels\\\").decode(\\\"utf-8\\\"))\\n        rid_to_media = {}\\n        for rel in rels_root.findall(PKG_REL):\\n            tgt = rel.get(\\\"Target\\\", \\\"\\\")\\n            img = \\\"xl/\\\" + tgt[3:] if tgt.startswith(\\\"../\\\") else tgt\\n            rid_to_media[rel.get(\\\"Id\\\")] = img\\n\\n        # E. metadata.xml: types / futureMetadata / valueMetadata\\n        md_root = ET.fromstring(z.read(\\\"xl/metadata.xml\\\").decode(\\\"utf-8\\\"))\\n        type_index, future, value_meta = {}, {}, []\\n        for child in md_root:\\n            lc = local(child)\\n            if lc == \\\"metadataTypes\\\":\\n                for i, mt in enumerate(child, start=1):\\n                    type_index[mt.get(\\\"name\\\")] = i\\n            elif lc == \\\"futureMetadata\\\":\\n                lst = []\\n                for bk in child:\\n                    rvb = next((int(e.get(\\\"i\\\")) for e in bk.iter() if local(e) == \\\"rvb\\\"), None)\\n                    lst.append(rvb)\\n                future[child.get(\\\"name\\\")] = lst\\n            elif lc == \\\"valueMetadata\\\":\\n                for bk in child:\\n                    rc = next((e for e in bk.iter() if local(e) == \\\"rc\\\"), None)\\n                    value_meta.append((int(rc.get(\\\"t\\\")), int(rc.get(\\\"v\\\"))) if rc is not None else None)\\n\\n        def vm_to_media(vm):\\n            idx = vm - 1\\n            if not (0 <= idx < len(value_meta)) or value_meta[idx] is None:\\n                return None\\n            t, v = value_meta[idx]\\n            if type_index.get(\\\"XLRICHVALUE\\\") != t:\\n                return None\\n            rvb_list = future.get(\\\"XLRICHVALUE\\\", [])\\n            if not (0 <= v < len(rvb_list)):\\n                return None\\n            rich_idx = rvb_list[v]\\n            if rich_idx is None or rich_idx not in rv_to_relpos:\\n                return None\\n            rid = relpos_to_rid.get(rv_to_relpos[rich_idx])\\n            return rid_to_media.get(rid) if rid else None\\n\\n        # F. 各 sheet 掃 vm cells\\n        sheet_names = get_sheet_names(z)\\n        for n in range(1, len(sheet_names) + 1):\\n            sx = f\\\"xl/worksheets/sheet{n}.xml\\\"\\n            if sx not in names:\\n                continue\\n            s = z.read(sx).decode(\\\"utf-8\\\", \\\"ignore\\\")\\n            for cell, vm in re.findall(r'<c r=\\\"([A-Z]+\\\\d+)\\\"[^>]*\\\\svm=\\\"(\\\\d+)\\\"', s):\\n                media = vm_to_media(int(vm))\\n                if media:\\n                    results.append((sheet_names[n], cell, media))\\n    return results\\n\\n\\npath = r\\\"G:\\\\AI\\\\excel-to-ai-document\\\\output\\\\Eye Strike2 規格書\\\\source\\\\Eye Strike2 規格書.xlsx\\\"\\nout = run(path)\\nprint(\\\"總計儲存格圖片:\\\", len(out))\\nfor sheet, cell, media in out:\\n    print(f\\\"  {sheet} [{cell}] -> {media}\\\")\\n\"}"</parameters>

  </facts>
  <narrative>Prototype validation confirms the rich value image extraction logic is correct and complete. The prototype script successfully extracted 29 cell-embedded images that the current production code misses entirely, including all 10 images reported missing from the 基本規格 sheet. The extraction follows a complex 6-step lookup chain through metadata.xml, futureMetadata, valueMetadata, richValue structure, and richValueRel relationships. The prototype demonstrates that image reuse is supported (image6.png mapped to both B72 and B92), which the deduplication logic will need to handle. This working prototype provides the validated foundation for integrating rich value image support into the main convert.py extraction pipeline.</narrative>

sheet、cell 錨點、圖片檔名\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    results = []\\n    with zipfile.ZipFile(xlsx_path) as z:\\n        # 解析每個 sheet 對應的 drawing XML\\n        for sheet_name, drawing_path in _resolve_sheet_drawings(z):\\n            if drawing_path not in z.namelist():\\n                continue\\n\\n            # 讀 drawing rels 取 rId→image 映射\\n            drawing_rels_path = _get_drawing_rels_path(drawing_path)\\n            rid_to_image = {}\\n            if drawing_rels_path in z.namelist():\\n                rels_xml = z.read(drawing_rels_path).decode(\\\"utf-8\\\")\\n                rels_root = ET.fromstring(rels_xml)\\n                for rel in rels_root.findall(\\\"{http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/package/2006/relationships}Relationship\\\"):\\n                    rid = rel.get(\\\"Id\\\", \\\"\\\")\\n                    target = rel.get(\\\"Target\\\", \\\"\\\")\\n                    if \\\"image\\\" in target.lower() or \\\"/media/\\\" in target:\\n                        # 正規化路徑\\n                        if target.startswith(\\\"../\\\"):\\n                            img_path = \\\"xl/\\\" + target[3:]\\n                        else:\\n                            img_path = target\\n                        rid_to_image[rid] = img_path\\n\\n            # 解析 anchors\\n            drawing_xml = z.read(drawing_path).decode(\\\"utf-8\\\")\\n            drawing_root = ET.fromstring(drawing_xml)\\n\\n            for anchor in drawing_root:\\n                tag = anchor.tag.split(\\\"}\\\")[-1] if \\\"}\\\" in anchor.tag else anchor.tag\\n                # twoCellAnchor / oneCellAnchor 有 <xdr:from> 錨點；absoluteAnchor 為絕對座標無 from\\n                if tag not in (\\\"twoCellAnchor\\\", \\\"oneCellAnchor\\\", \\\"absoluteAnchor\\\"):\\n                    continue\\n\\n                # 取錨點 cell（absoluteAnchor 無 from → 標記為絕對定位，仍抽圖不丟棄）\\n                cell = _anchor_cell(anchor)\\n\\n                # 取圖片 rId（可能在 pic/blipFill/blip 或 sp 裡）\\n                rid = _find_image_rid(anchor)\\n                if rid and rid in rid_to_image:\\n                    img_path = rid_to_image[rid]\\n                    results.append({\\n                        \\\"sheet\\\": sheet_name,\\n                        \\\"cell\\\": cell,\\n                        \\\"image_path_in_zip\\\": img_path,\\n                    })\\n\\n    return results\\n\\n\\ndef _resolve_sheet_drawings(z: zipfile.ZipFile) -> list[tuple[str, str]]:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"回傳 [(sheet_name, drawing_path), ...]，順 worksheet rels 找到各 sheet 的 drawing XML。\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    sheet_names = _get_sheet_names(z)\\n    pairs = []\\n    for name in z.namelist():\\n        m = re.match(r\\\"xl/worksheets/_rels/sheet(\\\\d+)\\\\.xml\\\\.rels\\\", name)\\n        if not m:\\n            continue\\n        sheet_idx = int(m.group(1))\\n        rels_root = ET.fromstring(z.read(name).decode(\\\"utf-8\\\"))\\n        for rel in rels_root.findall(\\\"{http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/package/2006/relationships}Relationship\\\"):\\n            target = rel.get(\\\"Target\\\", \\\"\\\")\\n            if \\\"drawing\\\" in target.lower():\\n                drawing_path = target.replace(\\\"../\\\", \\\"xl/\\\")\\n                sheet_name = sheet_names.get(sheet_idx, f\\\"Sheet{sheet_idx}\\\")\\n                pairs.append((sheet_name, drawing_path))\\n    return pairs\\n\\n\\ndef extract_shape_texts(xlsx_path: Path) -> list[dict]:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"抽取疊在工作表上的向量圖形（sp/cxnSp）的文字標註與其錨點 cell。\\n    pipeline 主抽點陣圖（blip）；callout 標註是 shape 內的 <a:t>，blip 抽不到，另抽。\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    NS_A = \\\"{http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/drawingml/2006/main}\\\"\\n    results = []\\n    with zipfile.ZipFile(xlsx_path) as z:\\n        for sheet_name, drawing_path in _resolve_sheet_drawings(z):\\n            if drawing_path not in z.namelist():\\n                continue\\n            drawing_root = ET.fromstring(z.read(drawing_path).decode(\\\"utf-8\\\"))\\n            for anchor in drawing_root:\\n                tag = anchor.tag.split(\\\"}\\\")[-1] if \\\"}\\\" in anchor.tag else anchor.tag\\n                if tag not in (\\\"twoCellAnchor\\\", \\\"oneCellAnchor\\\", \\\"absoluteAnchor\\\"):\\n                    continue\\n                # 收集 anchor 內所有文字（圖片 anchor 無 <a:t>，自然只命中 shape/連接線）\\n                texts = [\\n                    t.text.strip()\\n                    for t in anchor.iter(NS_A + \\\"t\\\")\\n                    if t.text and t.text.strip()\\n                ]\\n                if not texts:\\n                    continue\\n                results.append({\\n                    \\\"sheet\\\": sheet_name,\\n                    \\\"cell\\\": _anchor_cell(anchor),\\n                    \\\"text\\\": \\\" \\\".join(texts),\\n                })\\n    return results\\n\\n\\ndef _get_sheet_names(z: zipfile.ZipFile) -> dict[int, str]:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"從 workbook.xml 取 sheet 順序與名稱\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    names = {}\\n    wb_path = \\\"xl/workbook.xml\\\"\\n    if wb_path not in z.namelist():\\n        return names\\n    wb_xml = z.read(wb_path).decode(\\\"utf-8\\\")\\n    root = ET.fromstring(wb_xml)\\n    ns_wb = {\\\"s\\\": \\\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/spreadsheetml/2006/main\\\"}\\n    sheets = root.find(\\\"s:sheets\\\", ns_wb)\\n    if sheets is None:\\n        return names\\n    for i, sheet in enumerate(sheets.findall(\\\"s:sheet\\\", ns_wb), start=1):\\n        names[i] = sheet.get(\\\"name\\\", f\\\"Sheet{i}\\\")\\n    return names\\n\\n\\ndef _get_drawing_rels_path(drawing_path: str) -> str:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"drawing1.xml → xl/drawings/_rels/drawing1.xml.rels\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    parts = drawing_path.rsplit(\\\"/\\\", 1)\\n    if len(parts) == 2:\\n        return f\\\"{parts[0]}/_rels/{parts[1]}.rels\\\"\\n    return f\\\"_rels/{drawing_path}.rels\\\"\\n\\n\\ndef _find_image_rid(anchor_el) -> str | None:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"遞迴找 anchor 內的 blip embed rId\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    for el in anchor_el.iter():\\n        tag = el.tag.split(\\\"}\\\")[-1] if \\\"}\\\" in el.tag else el.tag\\n        if tag == \\\"blip\\\":\\n            return el.get(\\\"{http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships}embed\\\")\\n    return None\\n\\n\\ndef _anchor_cell(anchor_el) -> str:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"取 anchor 的錨點 cell。\\n    twoCellAnchor/oneCellAnchor 用 <xdr:from> 的 col/row（0-based）轉 A1；\\n    absoluteAnchor 無 from（絕對座標 EMU，無法可靠對回 cell）→ 回傳 '(absolute)'。\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    from_el = anchor_el.find(\\\"xdr:from\\\", NS)\\n    if from_el is not None:\\n        col_el = from_el.find(\\\"xdr:col\\\", NS)\\n        row_el = from_el.find(\\\"xdr:row\\\", NS)\\n        if col_el is not None and row_el is not None:\\n            col = int(col_el.text)  # 0-based\\n            row = int(row_el.text)  # 0-based\\n            return get_column_letter(col + 1) + str(row + 1)\\n    return \\\"(absolute)\\\"\\n\\n\\ndef get_merged_cells(xlsx_path: Path) -> list[dict]:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"用 openpyxl 讀取所有合併儲存格範圍，並抽出左上角的標頭值。\\n    合併區只有左上角 cell 持有值，故 header 取 (min_row, min_col)。\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    wb = openpyxl.load_workbook(xlsx_path, data_only=True)\\n    merges = []\\n    for ws in wb.worksheets:\\n        for merge_range in ws.merged_cells.ranges:\\n            # 取合併區左上角的值當 header（data_only 模式可直接讀值）\\n            min_row, min_col = merge_range.min_row, merge_range.min_col\\n            top_left = ws.cell(row=min_row, column=min_col).value\\n            header = str(top_left).strip() if top_left is not None else None\\n            merges.append({\\n                \\\"sheet\\\": ws.title,\\n                \\\"range\\\": str(merge_range),\\n                \\\"header\\\": header or None,  # 空字串正規化為 None\\n            })\\n    wb.close()\\n    return merges\\n\\n\\ndef _annotate_merged_range(images: list[dict], merges: list[dict]) -> None:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"原地標註：若圖片錨點 cell 落在某合併範圍內，填入該 range 字串。\\n    absoluteAnchor 的 cell='(absolute)' 無法解析座標 → 跳過（保持 None）。\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    # 按 sheet 建索引：[(min_col, min_row, max_col, max_row, range_str)]\\n    by_sheet: dict[str, list[tuple]] = {}\\n    for m in merges:\\n        min_col, min_row, max_col, max_row = range_boundaries(m[\\\"range\\\"])\\n        by_sheet.setdefault(m[\\\"sheet\\\"], []).append(\\n            (min_col, min_row, max_col, max_row, m[\\\"range\\\"])\\n        )\\n\\n    for img in images:\\n        try:\\n            row, col = coordinate_to_tuple(img[\\\"cell\\\"])  # (row, col)\\n        except (ValueError, TypeError):\\n            continue  # 非標準 cell（如 (absolute)）\\n        for min_col, min_row, max_col, max_row, rng in by_sheet.get(img[\\\"sheet\\\"], []):\\n            if min_row <= row <= max_row and min_col <= col <= max_col:\\n                img[\\\"merged_range\\\"] = rng\\n                break\\n\\n\\ndef _build_cell_list(ws) -> list[str]:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"把一張 sheet 的非空 cell 輸出為 [cell] 標註清單（合併感知）。\\n    合併區只有左上角持值，以 range 位址呈現（如 [B38:Z38]），值不重複灌進覆蓋格——\\n    這是 §7.4 合併標頭「下放」的省記憶體實作：span 由 range 明示，語意等價於逐列複製。\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    # 合併左上角 (row,col) → range 字串；覆蓋格集合（理論無值，保險跳過）\\n    merge_topleft = {}\\n    covered = set()\\n    for rng in ws.merged_cells.ranges:\\n        merge_topleft[(rng.min_row, rng.min_col)] = str(rng)\\n        for r in range(rng.min_row, rng.max_row + 1):\\n            for c in range(rng.min_col, rng.max_col + 1):\\n                if (r, c) != (rng.min_row, rng.min_col):\\n                    covered.add((r, c))\\n\\n    lines = []\\n    for row in ws.iter_rows():\\n        for cell in row:\\n            if cell.value is None:\\n                continue\\n            val = str(cell.value).strip()\\n            if not val:\\n                continue\\n            pos = (cell.row, cell.column)\\n            if pos in covered:\\n                continue\\n            addr = merge_topleft.get(pos) or f\\\"{get_column_letter(cell.column)}{cell.row}\\\"\\n            val = val.replace(\\\"\\\\n\\\", \\\" / \\\")  # 多行壓單行，避免破壞清單\\n            lines.append(f\\\"- **[{addr}]** {val}\\\")\\n    return lines\\n\\n\\ndef build_sheet_cell_lists(xlsx_path: Path, density_threshold: float = 0.15) -> dict[str, list[str]]:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"對稀疏（非空格密度 < threshold）的 sheet 產生 cell 清單。\\n    密集 sheet 不納入（保留 MarkItDown 原表）；空 sheet 納入但清單為空（後續標記為無內容）。\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    wb = openpyxl.load_workbook(xlsx_path, data_only=True)\\n    result = {}\\n    for ws in wb.worksheets:\\n        total = ws.max_row * ws.max_column\\n        if total <= 0:\\n            continue\\n        nonempty = sum(1 for row in ws.iter_rows() for c in row if c.value is not None)\\n        if nonempty / total < density_threshold:\\n            result[ws.title] = _build_cell_list(ws)\\n    wb.close()\\n    return result\\n\\n\\ndef _replace_sparse_tables(md_text: str, cell_lists: dict[str, list[str]]) -> str:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"把稀疏 sheet 的 NaN 表（MarkItDown 輸出）替換成 cell 清單；密集 sheet 原樣保留。\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    lines = md_text.split(\\\"\\\\n\\\")\\n    out = []\\n    title = None\\n    body = []\\n\\n    def flush():\\n        if title is not None and title in cell_lists:\\n            cl = cell_lists[title]\\n            out.append(\\\"\\\")\\n            out.extend(cl if cl else [\\\"（此工作表無儲存格內容）\\\"])\\n            out.append(\\\"\\\")\\n        else:\\n            out.extend(body)\\n\\n    for line in lines:\\n        m = re.match(r\\\"^##\\\\s+(.+)\\\", line)\\n        if m:\\n            flush()\\n            body = []\\n            title = m.group(1).strip()\\n            out.append(line)\\n        elif title is None:\\n            out.append(line)  # 首個標題前的前言，原樣保留\\n        else:\\n            body.append(line)\\n    flush()\\n    return \\\"\\\\n\\\".join(out)\\n\\n\\ndef convert(xlsx_path: str | Path, output_dir: str | Path = None):\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"主轉換函式\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    xlsx_path = Path(xlsx_path)\\n    if not xlsx_path.exists():\\n        print(f\\\"錯誤：找不到 {xlsx_path}\\\")\\n        sys.exit(1)\\n\\n    # 輸出目錄\\n    if output_dir is None:\\n        output_dir = Path.cwd() / \\\"output\\\" / xlsx_path.stem\\n    output_dir = Path(output_dir)\\n\\n    md_dir = output_dir / \\\"markdown\\\"\\n    img_dir = output_dir / \\\"images\\\"\\n    meta_dir = output_dir / \\\"metadata\\\"\\n    src_dir = output_dir / \\\"source\\\"\\n    for d in (md_dir, img_dir, meta_dir, src_dir):\\n        d.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\\n\\n    # 重產前清空 images/，杜絕來源改名/增刪時殘留的孤兒舊圖\\n    for old in img_dir.iterdir():\\n        if old.is_file():\\n            old.unlink()\\n\\n    print(f\\\"轉換：{xlsx_path.name}\\\")\\n    print(f\\\"輸出：{output_dir}\\\")\\n\\n    # 1. 複製原始檔（來源==目的時跳過，避免 copy-to-self 的 PermissionError）\\n    dst_src = src_dir / xlsx_path.name\\n    if xlsx_path.resolve() != dst_src.resolve():\\n t 屬性為 1-based\\n                    type_index[mt.get(\\\"name\\\")] = i\\n            elif lc == \\\"futureMetadata\\\":\\n                rvbs = []\\n                for bk in child:\\n                    rvbs.append(next(\\n                        (int(e.get(\\\"i\\\")) for e in bk.iter() if _strip_ns(e.tag) == \\\"rvb\\\"), None))\\n                future[child.get(\\\"name\\\")] = rvbs\\n            elif lc == \\\"valueMetadata\\\":\\n                for bk in child:\\n                    rc = next((e for e in bk.iter() if _strip_ns(e.tag) == \\\"rc\\\"), None)\\n                    value_meta.append(\\n                        (int(rc.get(\\\"t\\\")), int(rc.get(\\\"v\\\"))) if rc is not None else None)\\n\\n        def _vm_to_media(vm: int):\\n            idx = vm - 1  # vm 屬性為 1-based\\n            if not (0 <= idx < len(value_meta)) or value_meta[idx] is None:\\n                return None\\n            t, v = value_meta[idx]\\n            if type_index.get(\\\"XLRICHVALUE\\\") != t:\\n                return None  # 此 vm 非圖片型 rich value\\n            rvb_list = future.get(\\\"XLRICHVALUE\\\", [])\\n            if not (0 <= v < len(rvb_list)):\\n                return None\\n            rich_idx = rvb_list[v]\\n            if rich_idx is None or rich_idx not in rv_to_relpos:\\n                return None\\n            rid = relpos_to_rid.get(rv_to_relpos[rich_idx])\\n            return rid_to_media.get(rid) if rid else None\\n\\n        # F. 各 sheet 掃描帶 vm= 的儲存格，沿鏈解出 media\\n        sheet_names = _get_sheet_names(z)\\n        for idx, sheet_name in sheet_names.items():\\n            sx = f\\\"xl/worksheets/sheet{idx}.xml\\\"\\n            if sx not in names:\\n                continue\\n            sheet_xml = z.read(sx).decode(\\\"utf-8\\\", \\\"ignore\\\")\\n            for cell, vm in re.findall(r'<c r=\\\"([A-Z]+\\\\d+)\\\"[^>]*\\\\svm=\\\"(\\\\d+)\\\"', sheet_xml):\\n                img_path = _vm_to_media(int(vm))\\n                if img_path:\\n                    results.append({\\n                        \\\"sheet\\\": sheet_name,\\n                        \\\"cell\\\": cell,\\n                        \\\"image_path_in_zip\\\": img_path,\\n                    })\\n    return results\\n\\n\\ndef _get_sheet_names(z: zipfile.ZipFile) -> dict[int, str]:\",\"originalFile\":\"\\\"\\\"\\\"\\nExcel → AI Document 轉換 pipeline\\n\\n用途：把含大量示意圖的遊戲規格書(.xlsx) 轉成 AI 可理解的知識結構\\n輸出：markdown/ + images/ + metadata/ + source/\\n\\n核心策略：\\n1. MarkItDown 抽文字/表格\\n2. 解 xlsx zip 抽圖片 + drawing XML 錨點\\n3. openpyxl 讀合併儲存格範圍\\n4. 組合產出：內嵌圖片佔位符(標註 cell) 的 .md + metadata.json\\n\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n\\nimport sys\\nimport json\\nimport shutil\\nimport zipfile\\nimport re\\nfrom pathlib import Path\\nfrom xml.etree import ElementTree as ET\\n\\nimport openpyxl\\nfrom openpyxl.utils import get_column_letter, range_boundaries\\nfrom openpyxl.utils.cell import coordinate_to_tuple\\nfrom markitdown import MarkItDown\\n\\n\\n# xlsx 內 drawing XML 的 namespace\\nNS = {\\n    \\\"xdr\\\": \\\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/drawingml/2006/spreadsheetDrawing\\\",\\n    \\\"r\\\": \\\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships\\\",\\n    \\\"rel\\\": \\\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/package/2006/relationships\\\",\\n}\\n\\n\\ndef _strip_ns(tag: str) -> str:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"去掉 ElementTree 標籤的 namespace 前綴（{...}tag → tag）。\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    return tag.split(\\\"}\\\")[-1] if \\\"}\\\" in tag else tag\\n\\n\\ndef extract_images_with_anchors(xlsx_path: Path) -> list[dict]:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"解 xlsx zip，從 drawing XML 抽取每張圖的 sheet、cell 錨點、圖片檔名\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    results = []\\n    with zipfile.ZipFile(xlsx_path) as z:\\n        # 解析每個 sheet 對應的 drawing XML\\n        for sheet_name, drawing_path in _resolve_sheet_drawings(z):\\n            if drawing_path not in z.namelist():\\n                continue\\n\\n            # 讀 drawing rels 取 rId→image 映射\\n            drawing_rels_path = _get_drawing_rels_path(drawing_path)\\n            rid_to_image = {}\\n            if drawing_rels_path in z.namelist():\\n                rels_xml = z.read(drawing_rels_path).decode(\\\"utf-8\\\")\\n                rels_root = ET.fromstring(rels_xml)\\n                for rel in rels_root.findall(\\\"{http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/package/2006/relationships}Relationship\\\"):\\n                    rid = rel.get(\\\"Id\\\", \\\"\\\")\\n                    target = rel.get(\\\"Target\\\", \\\"\\\")\\n                    if \\\"image\\\" in target.lower() or \\\"/media/\\\" in target:\\n                        # 正規化路徑\\n                        if target.startswith(\\\"../\\\"):\\n                            img_path = \\\"xl/\\\" + target[3:]\\n                        else:\\n                            img_path = target\\n                        rid_to_image[rid] = img_path\\n\\n            # 解析 anchors\\n            drawing_xml = z.read(drawing_path).decode(\\\"utf-8\\\")\\n            drawing_root = ET.fromstring(drawing_xml)\\n\\n            for anchor in drawing_root:\\n                tag = anchor.tag.split(\\\"}\\\")[-1] if \\\"}\\\" in anchor.tag else anchor.tag\\n                # twoCellAnchor / oneCellAnchor 有 <xdr:from> 錨點；absoluteAnchor 為絕對座標無 from\\n                if tag not in (\\\"twoCellAnchor\\\", \\\"oneCellAnchor\\\", \\\"absoluteAnchor\\\"):\\n                    continue\\n\\n                # 取錨點 cell（absoluteAnchor 無 from → 標記為絕對定位，仍抽圖不丟棄）\\n                cell = _anchor_cell(anchor)\\n\\n                # 取圖片 rId（可能在 pic/blipFill/blip 或 sp 裡）\\n                rid = _find_image_rid(anchor)\\n                if rid and rid in rid_to_image:\\n                    img_path = rid_to_image[rid]\\n                    results.append({\\n                        \\\"sheet\\\": sheet_name,\\n                        \\\"cell\\\": cell,\\n                        \\\"image_path_in_zip\\\": img_path,\\n                    })\\n\\n    return results\\n\\n\\ndef _resolve_sheet_drawings(z: zipfile.ZipFile) -> list[tuple[str, str]]:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"回傳 [(sheet_name, drawing_path), ...]，順 worksheet rels 找到各 sheet 的 drawing XML。\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    sheet_names = _get_sheet_names(z)\\n    pairs = []\\n    for name in z.namelist():\\n        m = re.match(r\\\"xl/worksheets/_rels/sheet(\\\\d+)\\\\.xml\\\\.rels\\\", name)\\n        if not m:\\n            continue\\n        sheet_idx = int(m.group(1))\\n        rels_root = ET.fromstring(z.read(name).decode(\\\"utf-8\\\"))\\n        for rel in rels_root.findall(\\\"{http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/package/2006/relationships}Relationship\\\"):\\n            target = rel.get(\\\"Target\\\", \\\"\\\")\\n            if \\\"drawing\\\" in target.lower():\\n                drawing_path = target.replace(\\\"../\\\", \\\"xl/\\\")\\n                sheet_name = sheet_names.get(sheet_idx, f\\\"Sheet{sheet_idx}\\\")\\n                pairs.append((sheet_name, drawing_path))\\n    return pairs\\n\\n\\ndef extract_shape_texts(xlsx_path: Path) -> list[dict]:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"抽取疊在工作表上的向量圖形（sp/cxnSp）的文字標註與其錨點 cell。\\n    pipeline 主抽點陣圖（blip）；callout 標註是 shape 內的 <a:t>，blip 抽不到，另抽。\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    NS_A = \\\"{http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/drawingml/2006/main}\\\"\\n    results = []\\n    with zipfile.ZipFile(xlsx_path) as z:\\n        for sheet_name, drawing_path in _resolve_sheet_drawings(z):\\n            if drawing_path not in z.namelist():\\n                continue\\n            drawing_root = ET.fromstring(z.read(drawing_path).decode(\\\"utf-8\\\"))\\n            for anchor in drawing_root:\\n                tag = anchor.tag.split(\\\"}\\\")[-1] if \\\"}\\\" in anchor.tag else anchor.tag\\n                if tag not in (\\\"twoCellAnchor\\\", \\\"oneCellAnchor\\\", \\\"absoluteAnchor\\\"):\\n                    continue\\n                # 收集 anchor 內所有文字（圖片 anchor 無 <a:t>，自然只命中 shape/連接線）\\n                texts = [\\n                    t.text.strip()\\n                    for t in anchor.iter(NS_A + \\\"t\\\")\\n                    if t.text and t.text.strip()\\n                ]\\n                if not texts:\\n                    continue\\n                results.append({\\n                    \\\"sheet\\\": sheet_name,\\n                    \\\"cell\\\": _anchor_cell(anchor),\\n                    \\\"text\\\": \\\" \\\".join(texts),\\n                })\\n    return results\\n\\n\\ndef _get_sheet_names(z: zipfile.ZipFile) -> dict[int, str]:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"從 workbook.xml 取 sheet 順序與名稱\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    names = {}\\n    wb_path = \\\"xl/workbook.xml\\\"\\n    if wb_path not in z.namelist():\\n        return names\\n    wb_xml = z.read(wb_path).decode(\\\"utf-8\\\")\\n    root = ET.fromstring(wb_xml)\\n    ns_wb = {\\\"s\\\": \\\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/spreadsheetml/2006/main\\\"}\\n    sheets = root.find(\\\"s:sheets\\\", ns_wb)\\n    if sheets is None:\\n        return names\\n    for i, sheet in enumerate(sheets.findall(\\\"s:sheet\\\", ns_wb), start=1):\\n        names[i] = sheet.get(\\\"name\\\", f\\\"Sheet{i}\\\")\\n    return names\\n\\n\\ndef _get_drawing_rels_path(drawing_path: str) -> str:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"drawing1.xml → xl/drawings/_rels/drawing1.xml.rels\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    parts = drawing_path.rsplit(\\\"/\\\", 1)\\n    if len(parts) == 2:\\n        return f\\\"{parts[0]}/_rels/{parts[1]}.rels\\\"\\n    return f\\\"_rels/{drawing_path}.rels\\\"\\n\\n\\ndef _find_image_rid(anchor_el) -> str | None:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"遞迴找 anchor 內的 blip embed rId\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    for el in anchor_el.iter():\\n        tag = el.tag.split(\\\"}\\\")[-1] if \\\"}\\\" in el.tag else el.tag\\n        if tag == \\\"blip\\\":\\n            return el.get(\\\"{http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships}embed\\\")\\n    return None\\n\\n\\ndef _anchor_cell(anchor_el) -> str:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"取 anchor 的錨點 cell。\\n    twoCellAnchor/oneCellAnchor 用 <xdr:from> 的 col/row（0-based）轉 A1；\\n    absoluteAnchor 無 from（絕對座標 EMU，無法可靠對回 cell）→ 回傳 '(absolute)'。\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    from_el = anchor_el.find(\\\"xdr:from\\\", NS)\\n    if from_el is not None:\\n        col_el = from_el.find(\\\"xdr:col\\\", NS)\\n        row_el = from_el.find(\\\"xdr:row\\\", NS)\\n        if col_el is not None and row_el is not None:\\n            col = int(col_el.text)  # 0-based\\n            row = int(row_el.text)  # 0-based\\n            return get_column_letter(col + 1) + str(row + 1)\\n    return \\\"(absolute)\\\"\\n\\n\\ndef get_merged_cells(xlsx_path: Path) -> list[dict]:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"用 openpyxl 讀取所有合併儲存格範圍，並抽出左上角的標頭值。\\n    合併區只有左上角 cell 持有值，故 header 取 (min_row, min_col)。\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    wb = openpyxl.load_workbook(xlsx_path, data_only=True)\\n    merges = []\\n    for ws in wb.worksheets:\\n        for merge_range in ws.merged_cells.ranges:\\n            # 取合併區左上角的值當 header（data_only 模式可直接讀值）\\n            min_row, min_col = merge_range.min_row, merge_range.min_col\\n            top_left = ws.cell(row=min_row, column=min_col).value\\n            header = str(top_left).strip() if top_left is not None else None\\n            merges.append({\\n                \\\"sheet\\\": ws.title,\\n                \\\"range\\\": str(merge_range),\\n                \\\"header\\\": header or None,  # 空字串正規化為 None\\n            })\\n    wb.close()\\n    return merges\\n\\n\\ndef _annotate_merged_range(images: list[dict], merges: list[dict]) -> None:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"原地標註：若圖片錨點 cell 落在某合併範圍內，填入該 range 字串。\\n    absoluteAnchor 的 cell='(absolute)' 無法解析座標 → 跳過（保持 None）。\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    # 按 sheet 建索引：[(min_col, min_row, max_col, max_row, range_str)]\\n    by_sheet: dict[str, list[tuple]] = {}\\n    for m in merges:\\n        min_col, min_row, max_col, max_row = range_boundaries(m[\\\"range\\\"])\\n        by_sheet.setdefault(m[\\\"sheet\\\"], []).append(\\n            (min_col, min_row, max_col, max_row, m[\\\"range\\\"])\\n        )\\n\\n    for img in images:\\n        try:\\n            row, col = coordinate_to_tuple(img[\\\"cell\\\"])  # (row, col)\\n        except (ValueError, TypeError):\\n            continue  # 非標準 cell（如 (absolute)）\\n        for min_col, min_row, max_col, max_row, rng in by_sheet.get(img[\\\"sheet\\\"], []):\\n            if min_row <= row <= max_row and min_col <= col <= max_col:\\n                img[\\\"merged_range\\\"] = rng\\n                break\\n\\n\\ndef _build_cell_list(ws) -> list[str]:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"把一張 sheet 的非空 cell 輸出為 [cell] 標註清單（合併感知）。\\n    合併區只有左上角持值，以 range 位址呈現（如 [B38:Z38]），值不重複灌進覆蓋格——\\n    這是 §7.4 合併標頭「下放」的省記憶體實作：span 由 range 明示，語意等價於逐列複製。\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    # 合併左上角 (row,col) → range 字串；覆蓋格集合（理論無值，保險跳過）\\n    merge_topleft = {}\\n    covered = set()\\n    for rng in ws.merged_cells.ranges:\\n        merge_topleft[(rng.min_row, rng.min_col)] = str(rng)\\n        for r in range(rng.min_row, rng.max_row + 1):\\n            for c in range(rng.min_col, rng.max_col + 1):\\n                if (r, c) != (rng.min_row, rng.min_col):\\n                    covered.add((r, c))\\n\\n    lines = []\\n    for row in ws.iter_rows():\\n        for cell in row:\\n            if cell.value is None:\\n                continue\\n            val = str(cell.value).strip()\\n            if not val:\\n                continue\\n            pos = (cell.row, cell.column)\\n            if pos in covered:\\n                continue\\n            addr = merge_topleft.get(pos) or f\\\"{get_column_letter(cell.column)}{cell.row}\\\"\\n            val = val.replace(\\\"\\\\n\\\", \\\" / \\\")  # 多行壓單行，避免破壞清單\\n            lines.append(f\\\"- **[{addr}]** {val}\\\")\\n    return lines\\n\\n\\ndef build_sheet_cell_lists(xlsx_path: Path, density_threshold: float = 0.15) -> dict[str, list[str]]:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"對稀疏（非空格密度 < threshold）的 sheet 產生 cell 清單。\\n    密集 sheet 不納入（保留 MarkItDown 原表）；空 sheet 納入但清單為空（後續標記為無內容）。\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    wb = openpyxl.load_workbook(xlsx_path, data_only=True)\\n    result = {}\\n    for ws in wb.worksheets:\\n        total = ws.max_row * ws.max_column\\n        if total <= 0:\\n            continue\\n        nonempty = sum(1 for row in ws.iter_rows() for c in row if c.value is not None)\\n        if nonempty / total < density_threshold:\\n            result[ws.title] = _build_cell_list(ws)\\n    wb.close()\\n    return result\\n\\n\\ndef _replace_sparse_tables(md_text: str, cell_lists: dict[str, list[str]]) -> str:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"把稀疏 sheet 的 NaN 表（MarkItDown 輸出）替換成 cell 清單；密集 sheet 原樣保留。\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    lines = md_text.split(\\\"\\\\n\\\")\\n    out = []\\n    title = None\\n    body = []\\n\\n    def flush():\\n        if title is not None and title in cell_lists:\\n            cl = cell_lists[title]\\n            out.append(\\\"\\\")\\n            out.extend(cl if cl else [\\\"（此工作表無儲存格內容）\\\"])\\n            out.append(\\\"\\\")\\n        else:\\n            out.extend(body)\\n\\n    for line in lines:\\n        m = re.match(r\\\"^##\\\\s+(.+)\\\", line)\\n        if m:\\n            flush()\\n            body = []\\n            title = m.group(1).strip()\\n            out.append(line)\\n        elif title is None:\\n            out.append(line)  # 首個標題前的前言，原樣保留\\n        else:\\n            body.append(line)\\n    flush()\\n    return \\\"\\\\n\\\".join(out)\\n\\n\\ndef convert(xlsx_path: str | Path, output_dir: str | Path = None):\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"主轉換函式\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    xlsx_path = Path(xlsx_path)\\n    if not xlsx_path.exists():\\n        print(f\\\"錯誤：找不到 {xlsx_path}\\\")\\n        sys.exit(1)\\n\\n    # 輸出目錄\\n    if output_dir is None:\\n        output_dir = Path.cwd() / \\\"output\\\" / xlsx_path.stem\\n    output_dir = Path(output_dir)\\n\\n    md_dir = output_dir / \\\"markdown\\\"\\n    img_dir = output_dir / \\\"images\\\"\\n    meta_dir = output_dir / \\\"metadata\\\"\\n    src_dir = output_dir / \\\"source\\\"\\n    for d in (md_dir, img_dir, meta_dir, src_dir):\\n        d.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\\n\\n    # 重產前清空 images/，杜絕來源改名/增刪時殘留的孤兒舊圖\\n    for old in img_dir.iterdir():\\n        if old.is_file():\\n            old.unlink()\\n\\n    print(f\\\"轉換：{xlsx_path.name}\\\")\\n    print(f\\\"輸出：{output_dir}\\\")\\n\\n    # 1. 複製原始檔（來源==目的時跳過，避免 copy-to-self 的 PermissionError）\\n    dst_src = src_dir / xlsx_path.name\\n    if xlsx_path.resolve() != dst_src.resolve():\\n        shutil.copy2(xlsx_path, dst_src)\\n        print(\\\"[OK] 原始檔已複製\\\")\\n    else:\\n        print(\\\"[OK] 來源即輸出位置，跳過複製\\\")\\n\\n    # 2. MarkItDown 抽文字/表格\\n    print(\\\"  抽取文字/表格（MarkItDown）...\\\")\\n    mit = MarkItDown()\\n    result = mit.convert(str(xlsx_path))\\n    md_text = result.text_content\\n    print(f\\\"[OK] 文字抽取完成（{len(md_text)} 字元）\\\")\\n\\n    # 3. 抽圖片 + 錨點\\n    print(\\\"  抽取圖片與錨點（zip/drawing XML）...\\\")\\n    images = extract_images_with_anchors(xlsx_path)\\n    print(f\\\"[OK] 找到 {len(images)} 張圖片\\\")\\n\\n    # 實際 dump 圖片到 images/\\n    extracted_images = []\\n    with zipfile.ZipFile(xlsx_path) as z:\\n        for img_info in images:\\n            zip_img_path = img_info[\\\"image_path_in_zip\\\"]\\n            if zip_img_path in z.namelist():\\n                # 產生易讀檔名：sheet_cell_原始檔名（cell 可能含括號如 (absolute)，一併淨化）\\n                orig_name = Path(zip_img_path).name\\n                safe_sheet = re.sub(r'[^\\\\w\\\\-]', '_', img_info[\\\"sheet\\\"])\\n                safe_cell = re.sub(r'[^\\\\w\\\\-]', '_', img_info[\\\"cell\\\"])\\n                out_name = f\\\"{safe_sheet}_{safe_cell}_{orig_name}\\\"\\n                out_path = img_dir / out_name\\n                with z.open(zip_img_path) as src, open(out_path, \\\"wb\\\") as dst:\\n                    dst.write(src.read())\\n                extracted_images.append({\\n                    \\\"sheet\\\": img_info[\\\"sheet\\\"],\\n                    \\\"cell\\\": img_info[\\\"cell\\\"],\\n                    \\\"merged_range\\\": None,   # 由 _annotate_merged_range 補上\\n                    \\\"image\\\": f\\\"images/{out_name}\\\",\\n                    \\\"description\\\": None,    # 選用檢索提示（§9），預設留空\\n                })\\n\\n    print(f\\\"[OK] 已匯出 {len(extracted_images)} 張圖片\\\")\\n\\n    # 4. 合併儲存格\\n    print(\\\"  讀取合併儲存格...\\\")\\n    merges = get_merged_cells(xlsx_path)\\n    print(f\\\"[OK] 找到 {len(merges)} 個合併範圍\\\")\\n\\n    # 4.5 為圖片標註其錨點所在的合併範圍（若有）\\n    _annotate_merged_range(extracted_images, merges)\\n\\n    # 4.6 抽取疊在工作表上的圖形文字標註（callout）\\n    print(\\\"  抽取圖形文字標註（shape/連接線）...\\\")\\n    shape_texts = extract_shape_texts(xlsx_path)\\n    print(f\\\"[OK] 找到 {len(shape_texts)} 筆圖形文字標註\\\")\\n\\n    # 4.7 稀疏文件型 sheet：用 cell 清單取代 NaN 灌爆的表（密度閘門）\\n    print(\\\"  重建稀疏工作表（cell 清單取代 NaN 表）...\\\")\\n    cell_lists = build_sheet_cell_lists(xlsx_path)\\n    md_text = _replace_sparse_tables(md_text, cell_lists)\\n    print(f\\\"[OK] 重建 {len(cell_lists)} 個稀疏工作表\\\")\\n\\n    # 5. 在 Markdown 內嵌圖片佔位符 + 圖形文字標註\\n    md_with_images = _inject_image_placeholders(md_text, extracted_images, shape_texts)\\n\\n    # 寫出 F. 各 sheet 掃描帶 vm= 的儲存格，沿鏈解出 media\\n        sheet_names = _get_sheet_names(z)\\n        for idx, sheet_name in sheet_names.items():\\n            sx = f\\\"xl/worksheets/sheet{idx}.xml\\\"\\n            if sx not in names:\\n                continue\\n            sheet_xml = z.read(sx).decode(\\\"utf-8\\\", \\\"ignore\\\")\\n            for cell, vm in re.findall(r'<c r=\\\"([A-Z]+\\\\d+)\\\"[^>]*\\\\svm=\\\"(\\\\d+)\\\"', sheet_xml):\\n                img_path = _vm_to_media(int(vm))\\n                if img_path:\\n                    results.append({\\n                        \\\"sheet\\\": sheet_name,\\n                        \\\"cell\\\": cell,\\n                        \\\"image_path_in_zip\\\": img_path,\\n                    })\\n    return results\\n\\n\\ndef _get_sheet_names(z: zipfile.ZipFile) -> dict[int, str]:\",\"originalFile\":\"\\\"\\\"\\\"\\nExcel → AI Document 轉換 pipeline\\n\\n用途：把含大量示意圖的遊戲規格書(.xlsx) 轉成 AI 可理解的知識結構\\n輸出：markdown/ + images/ + metadata/ + source/\\n\\n核心策略：\\n1. MarkItDown 抽文字/表格\\n2. 解 xlsx zip 抽圖片 + drawing XML 錨點\\n3. openpyxl 讀合併儲存格範圍\\n4. 組合產出：內嵌圖片佔位符(標註 cell) 的 .md + metadata.json\\n\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n\\nimport sys\\nimport json\\nimport shutil\\nimport zipfile\\nimport re\\nfrom pathlib import Path\\nfrom xml.etree import ElementTree as ET\\n\\nimport openpyxl\\nfrom openpyxl.utils import get_column_letter, range_boundaries\\nfrom openpyxl.utils.cell import coordinate_to_tuple\\nfrom markitdown import MarkItDown\\n\\n\\n# xlsx 內 drawing XML 的 namespace\\nNS = {\\n    \\\"xdr\\\": \\\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/drawingml/2006/spreadsheetDrawing\\\",\\n    \\\"r\\\": \\\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships\\\",\\n    \\\"rel\\\": \\\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/package/2006/relationships\\\",\\n}\\n\\n\\ndef _strip_ns(tag: str) -> str:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"去掉 ElementTree 標籤的 namespace 前綴（{...}tag → tag）。\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    return tag.split(\\\"}\\\")[-1] if \\\"}\\\" in tag else tag\\n\\n\\ndef extract_images_with_anchors(xlsx_path: Path) -> list[dict]:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"解 xlsx zip，從 drawing XML 抽取每張圖的 sheet、cell 錨點、圖片檔名\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    results = []\\n    with zipfile.ZipFile(xlsx_path) as z:\\n        # 解析每個 sheet 對應的 drawing XML\\n        for sheet_name, drawing_path in _resolve_sheet_drawings(z):\\n            if drawing_path not in z.namelist():\\n                continue\\n\\n            # 讀 drawing rels 取 rId→image 映射\\n            drawing_rels_path = _get_drawing_rels_path(drawing_path)\\n            rid_to_image = {}\\n            if drawing_rels_path in z.namelist():\\n                rels_xml = z.read(drawing_rels_path).decode(\\\"utf-8\\\")\\n                rels_root = ET.fromstring(rels_xml)\\n                for rel in rels_root.findall(\\\"{http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/package/2006/relationships}Relationship\\\"):\\n                    rid = rel.get(\\\"Id\\\", \\\"\\\")\\n                    target = rel.get(\\\"Target\\\", \\\"\\\")\\n                    if \\\"image\\\" in target.lower() or \\\"/media/\\\" in target:\\n                        # 正規化路徑\\n                        if target.startswith(\\\"../\\\"):\\n                            img_path = \\\"xl/\\\" + target[3:]\\n                        else:\\n                            img_path = target\\n                        rid_to_image[rid] = img_path\\n\\n            # 解析 anchors\\n            drawing_xml = z.read(drawing_path).decode(\\\"utf-8\\\")\\n            drawing_root = ET.fromstring(drawing_xml)\\n\\n            for anchor in drawing_root:\\n                tag = anchor.tag.split(\\\"}\\\")[-1] if \\\"}\\\" in anchor.tag else anchor.tag\\n                # twoCellAnchor / oneCellAnchor 有 <xdr:from> 錨點；absoluteAnchor 為絕對座標無 from\\n                if tag not in (\\\"twoCellAnchor\\\", \\\"oneCellAnchor\\\", \\\"absoluteAnchor\\\"):\\n                    continue\\n\\n                # 取錨點 cell（absoluteAnchor 無 from → 標記為絕對定位，仍抽圖不丟棄）\\n                cell = _anchor_cell(anchor)\\n\\n                # 取圖片 rId（可能在 pic/blipFill/blip 或 sp 裡）\\n                rid = _find_image_rid(anchor)\\n                if rid and rid in rid_to_image:\\n                    img_path = rid_to_image[rid]\\n                    results.append({\\n                        \\\"sheet\\\": sheet_name,\\n                        \\\"cell\\\": cell,\\n                        \\\"image_path_in_zip\\\": img_path,\\n                    })\\n\\n    return results\\n\\n\\ndef _resolve_sheet_drawings(z: zipfile.ZipFile) -> list[tuple[str, str]]:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"回傳 [(sheet_name, drawing_path), ...]，順 worksheet rels 找到各 sheet 的 drawing XML。\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    sheet_names = _get_sheet_names(z)\\n    pairs = []\\n    for name in z.namelist():\\n        m = re.match(r\\\"xl/worksheets/_rels/sheet(\\\\d+)\\\\.xml\\\\.rels\\\", name)\\n        if not m:\\n            continue\\n        sheet_idx = int(m.group(1))\\n        rels_root = ET.fromstring(z.read(name).decode(\\\"utf-8\\\"))\\n        for rel in rels_root.findall(\\\"{http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/package/2006/relationships}Relationship\\\"):\\n            target = rel.get(\\\"Target\\\", \\\"\\\")\\n            if \\\"drawing\\\" in target.lower():\\n                drawing_path = target.replace(\\\"../\\\", \\\"xl/\\\")\\n                sheet_name = sheet_names.get(sheet_idx, f\\\"Sheet{sheet_idx}\\\")\\n                pairs.append((sheet_name, drawing_path))\\n    return pairs\\n\\n\\ndef extract_shape_texts(xlsx_path: Path) -> list[dict]:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"抽取疊在工作表上的向量圖形（sp/cxnSp）的文字標註與其錨點 cell。\\n    pipeline 主抽點陣圖（blip）；callout 標註是 shape 內的 <a:t>，blip 抽不到，另抽。\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    NS_A = \\\"{http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/drawingml/2006/main}\\\"\\n    results = []\\n    with zipfile.ZipFile(xlsx_path) as z:\\n        for sheet_name, drawing_path in _resolve_sheet_drawings(z):\\n            if drawing_path not in z.namelist():\\n                continue\\n            drawing_root = ET.fromstring(z.read(drawing_path).decode(\\\"utf-8\\\"))\\n            for anchor in drawing_root:\\n                tag = anchor.tag.split(\\\"}\\\")[-1] if \\\"}\\\" in anchor.tag else anchor.tag\\n                if tag not in (\\\"twoCellAnchor\\\", \\\"oneCellAnchor\\\", \\\"absoluteAnchor\\\"):\\n                    continue\\n                # 收集 anchor 內所有文字（圖片 anchor 無 <a:t>，自然只命中 shape/連接線）\\n                texts = [\\n                    t.text.strip()\\n                    for t in anchor.iter(NS_A + \\\"t\\\")\\n                    if t.text and t.text.strip()\\n                ]\\n                if not texts:\\n                    continue\\n                results.append({\\n                    \\\"sheet\\\": sheet_name,\\n                    \\\"cell\\\": _anchor_cell(anchor),\\n                    \\\"text\\\": \\\" \\\".join(texts),\\n                })\\n    return results\\n\\n\\ndef _get_sheet_names(z: zipfile.ZipFile) -> dict[int, str]:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"從 workbook.xml 取 sheet 順序與名稱\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    names = {}\\n    wb_path = \\\"xl/workbook.xml\\\"\\n    if wb_path not in z.namelist():\\n        return names\\n    wb_xml = z.read(wb_path).decode(\\\"utf-8\\\")\\n    root = ET.fromstring(wb_xml)\\n    ns_wb = {\\\"s\\\": \\\"http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/spreadsheetml/2006/main\\\"}\\n    sheets = root.find(\\\"s:sheets\\\", ns_wb)\\n    if sheets is None:\\n        return names\\n    for i, sheet in enumerate(sheets.findall(\\\"s:sheet\\\", ns_wb), start=1):\\n        names[i] = sheet.get(\\\"name\\\", f\\\"Sheet{i}\\\")\\n    return names\\n\\n\\ndef _get_drawing_rels_path(drawing_path: str) -> str:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"drawing1.xml → xl/drawings/_rels/drawing1.xml.rels\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    parts = drawing_path.rsplit(\\\"/\\\", 1)\\n    if len(parts) == 2:\\n        return f\\\"{parts[0]}/_rels/{parts[1]}.rels\\\"\\n    return f\\\"_rels/{drawing_path}.rels\\\"\\n\\n\\ndef _find_image_rid(anchor_el) -> str | None:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"遞迴找 anchor 內的 blip embed rId\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    for el in anchor_el.iter():\\n        tag = el.tag.split(\\\"}\\\")[-1] if \\\"}\\\" in el.tag else el.tag\\n        if tag == \\\"blip\\\":\\n            return el.get(\\\"{http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/officeDocument/2006/relationships}embed\\\")\\n    return None\\n\\n\\ndef _anchor_cell(anchor_el) -> str:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"取 anchor 的錨點 cell。\\n    twoCellAnchor/oneCellAnchor 用 <xdr:from> 的 col/row（0-based）轉 A1；\\n    absoluteAnchor 無 from（絕對座標 EMU，無法可靠對回 cell）→ 回傳 '(absolute)'。\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    from_el = anchor_el.find(\\\"xdr:from\\\", NS)\\n    if from_el is not None:\\n        col_el = from_el.find(\\\"xdr:col\\\", NS)\\n        row_el = from_el.find(\\\"xdr:row\\\", NS)\\n        if col_el is not None and row_el is not None:\\n            col = int(col_el.text)  # 0-based\\n            row = int(row_el.text)  # 0-based\\n            return get_column_letter(col + 1) + str(row + 1)\\n    return \\\"(absolute)\\\"\\n\\n\\ndef get_merged_cells(xlsx_path: Path) -> list[dict]:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"用 openpyxl 讀取所有合併儲存格範圍，並抽出左上角的標頭值。\\n    合併區只有左上角 cell 持有值，故 header 取 (min_row, min_col)。\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    wb = openpyxl.load_workbook(xlsx_path, data_only=True)\\n    merges = []\\n    for ws in wb.worksheets:\\n        for merge_range in ws.merged_cells.ranges:\\n            # 取合併區左上角的值當 header（data_only 模式可直接讀值）\\n            min_row, min_col = merge_range.min_row, merge_range.min_col\\n            top_left = ws.cell(row=min_row, column=min_col).value\\n            header = str(top_left).strip() if top_left is not None else None\\n            merges.append({\\n                \\\"sheet\\\": ws.title,\\n                \\\"range\\\": str(merge_range),\\n                \\\"header\\\": header or None,  # 空字串正規化為 None\\n            })\\n    wb.close()\\n    return merges\\n\\n\\ndef _annotate_merged_range(images: list[dict], merges: list[dict]) -> None:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"原地標註：若圖片錨點 cell 落在某合併範圍內，填入該 range 字串。\\n    absoluteAnchor 的 cell='(absolute)' 無法解析座標 → 跳過（保持 None）。\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    # 按 sheet 建索引：[(min_col, min_row, max_col, max_row, range_str)]\\n    by_sheet: dict[str, list[tuple]] = {}\\n    for m in merges:\\n        min_col, min_row, max_col, max_row = range_boundaries(m[\\\"range\\\"])\\n        by_sheet.setdefault(m[\\\"sheet\\\"], []).append(\\n            (min_col, min_row, max_col, max_row, m[\\\"range\\\"])\\n        )\\n\\n    for img in images:\\n        try:\\n            row, col = coordinate_to_tuple(img[\\\"cell\\\"])  # (row, col)\\n        except (ValueError, TypeError):\\n            continue  # 非標準 cell（如 (absolute)）\\n        for min_col, min_row, max_col, max_row, rng in by_sheet.get(img[\\\"sheet\\\"], []):\\n            if min_row <= row <= max_row and min_col <= col <= max_col:\\n                img[\\\"merged_range\\\"] = rng\\n                break\\n\\n\\ndef _build_cell_list(ws) -> list[str]:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"把一張 sheet 的非空 cell 輸出為 [cell] 標註清單（合併感知）。\\n    合併區只有左上角持值，以 range 位址呈現（如 [B38:Z38]），值不重複灌進覆蓋格——\\n    這是 §7.4 合併標頭「下放」的省記憶體實作：span 由 range 明示，語意等價於逐列複製。\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    # 合併左上角 (row,col) → range 字串；覆蓋格集合（理論無值，保險跳過）\\n    merge_topleft = {}\\n    covered = set()\\n    for rng in ws.merged_cells.ranges:\\n        merge_topleft[(rng.min_row, rng.min_col)] = str(rng)\\n        for r in range(rng.min_row, rng.max_row + 1):\\n            for c in range(rng.min_col, rng.max_col + 1):\\n                if (r, c) != (rng.min_row, rng.min_col):\\n                    covered.add((r, c))\\n\\n    lines = []\\n    for row in ws.iter_rows():\\n        for cell in row:\\n            if cell.value is None:\\n                continue\\n            val = str(cell.value).strip()\\n            if not val:\\n                continue\\n            pos = (cell.row, cell.column)\\n            if pos in covered:\\n                continue\\n            addr = merge_topleft.get(pos) or f\\\"{get_column_letter(cell.column)}{cell.row}\\\"\\n            val = val.replace(\\\"\\\\n\\\", \\\" / \\\")  # 多行壓單行，避免破壞清單\\n            lines.append(f\\\"- **[{addr}]** {val}\\\")\\n    return lines\\n\\n\\ndef build_sheet_cell_lists(xlsx_path: Path, density_threshold: float = 0.15) -> dict[str, list[str]]:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"對稀疏（非空格密度 < threshold）的 sheet 產生 cell 清單。\\n    密集 sheet 不納入（保留 MarkItDown 原表）；空 sheet 納入但清單為空（後續標記為無內容）。\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    wb = openpyxl.load_workbook(xlsx_path, data_only=True)\\n    result = {}\\n    for ws in wb.worksheets:\\n        total = ws.max_row * ws.max_column\\n        if total <= 0:\\n            continue\\n        nonempty = sum(1 for row in ws.iter_rows() for c in row if c.value is not None)\\n        if nonempty / total < density_threshold:\\n            result[ws.title] = _build_cell_list(ws)\\n    wb.close()\\n    return result\\n\\n\\ndef _replace_sparse_tables(md_text: str, cell_lists: dict[str, list[str]]) -> str:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"把稀疏 sheet 的 NaN 表（MarkItDown 輸出）替換成 cell 清單；密集 sheet 原樣保留。\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    lines = md_text.split(\\\"\\\\n\\\")\\n    out = []\\n    title = None\\n    body = []\\n\\n    def flush():\\n        if title is not None and title in cell_lists:\\n            cl = cell_lists[title]\\n            out.append(\\\"\\\")\\n            out.extend(cl if cl else [\\\"（此工作表無儲存格內容）\\\"])\\n            out.append(\\\"\\\")\\n        else:\\n            out.extend(body)\\n\\n    for line in lines:\\n        m = re.match(r\\\"^##\\\\s+(.+)\\\", line)\\n        if m:\\n            flush()\\n            body = []\\n            title = m.group(1).strip()\\n            out.append(line)\\n        elif title is None:\\n            out.append(line)  # 首個標題前的前言，原樣保留\\n        else:\\n            body.append(line)\\n    flush()\\n    return \\\"\\\\n\\\".join(out)\\n\\n\\ndef convert(xlsx_path: str | Path, output_dir: str | Path = None):\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"主轉換函式\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    xlsx_path = Path(xlsx_path)\\n    if not xlsx_path.exists():\\n        print(f\\\"錯誤：找不到 {xlsx_path}\\\")\\n        sys.exit(1)\\n\\n    # 輸出目錄\\n    if output_dir is None:\\n        output_dir = Path.cwd() / \\\"output\\\" / xlsx_path.stem\\n    output_dir = Path(output_dir)\\n\\n    md_dir = output_dir / \\\"markdown\\\"\\n    img_dir = output_dir / \\\"images\\\"\\n    meta_dir = output_dir / \\\"metadata\\\"\\n    src_dir = output_dir / \\\"source\\\"\\n    for d in (md_dir, img_dir, meta_dir, src_dir):\\n        d.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\\n\\n    # 重產前清空 images/，杜絕來源改名/增刪時殘留的孤兒舊圖\\n    for old in img_dir.iterdir():\\n        if old.is_file():\\n            old.unlink()\\n\\n    print(f\\\"轉換：{xlsx_path.name}\\\")\\n    print(f\\\"輸出：{output_dir}\\\")\\n\\n    # 1. 複製原始檔（來源==目的時跳過，避免 copy-to-self 的 PermissionError）\\n    dst_src = src_dir / xlsx_path.name\\n    if xlsx_path.resolve() != dst_src.resolve():\\n        shutil.copy2(xlsx_path, dst_src)\\n        print(\\\"[OK] 原始檔已複製\\\")\\n    else:\\n        print(\\\"[OK] 來源即輸出位置，跳過複製\\\")\\n\\n    # 2. MarkItDown 抽文字/表格\\n    print(\\\"  抽取文字/表格（MarkItDown）...\\\")\\n    mit = MarkItDown()\\n    result = mit.convert(str(xlsx_path))\\n    md_text = result.text_content\\n    print(f\\\"[OK] 文字抽取完成（{len(md_text)} 字元）\\\")\\n\\n    # 3. 抽圖片 + 錨點\\n    print(\\\"  抽取圖片與錨點（zip/drawing XML）...\\\")\\n    images = extract_images_with_anchors(xlsx_path)\\n    print(f\\\"[OK] 找到 {len(images)} 張圖片\\\")\\n\\n    # 實際 dump 圖片到 images/\\n    extracted_images = []\\n    with zipfile.ZipFile(xlsx_path) as z:\\n        for img_info in images:\\n            zip_img_path = img_info[\\\"image_path_in_zip\\\"]\\n            if zip_img_path in z.namelist():\\n                # 產生易讀檔名：sheet_cell_原始檔名（cell 可能含括號如 (absolute)，一併淨化）\\n                orig_name = Path(zip_img_path).name\\n                safe_sheet = re.sub(r'[^\\\\w\\\\-]', '_', img_info[\\\"sheet\\\"])\\n                safe_cell = re.sub(r'[^\\\\w\\\\-]', '_', img_info[\\\"cell\\\"])\\n                out_name = f\\\"{safe_sheet}_{safe_cell}_{orig_name}\\\"\\n                out_path = img_dir / out_name\\n                with z.open(zip_img_path) as src, open(out_path, \\\"wb\\\") as dst:\\n                    dst.write(src.read())\\n                extracted_images.append({\\n                    \\\"sheet\\\": img_info[\\\"sheet\\\"],\\n                    \\\"cell\\\": img_info[\\\"cell\\\"],\\n                    \\\"merged_range\\\": None,   # 由 _annotate_merged_range 補上\\n                    \\\"image\\\": f\\\"images/{out_name}\\\",\\n                    \\\"description\\\": None,    # 選用檢索提示（§9），預設留空\\n                })\\n\\n    print(f\\\"[OK] 已匯出 {len(extracted_images)} 張圖片\\\")\\n\\n    # 4. 合併儲存格\\n    print(\\\"  讀取合併儲存格...\\\")\\n    merges = get_merged_cells(xlsx_path)\\n    print(f\\\"[OK] 找到 {len(merges)} 個合併範圍\\\")\\n\\n    # 4.5 為圖片標註其錨點所在的合併範圍（若有）\\n    _annotate_merged_range(extracted_images, merges)\\n\\n    # 4.6 抽取疊在工作表上的圖形文字標註（callout）\\n    print(\\\"  抽取圖形文字標註（shape/連接線）...\\\")\\n    shape_texts = extract_shape_texts(xlsx_path)\\n    print(f\\\"[OK] 找到 {len(shape_texts)} 筆圖形文字標註\\\")\\n\\n    # 4.7 稀疏文件型 sheet：用 cell 清單取代 NaN 灌爆的表（密度閘門）\\n    print(\\\"  重建稀疏工作表（cell 清單取代 NaN 表）...\\\")\\n    cell_lists = build_sheet_cell_lists(xlsx_path)\\n    md_text = _replace_sparse_tables(md_text, cell_lists)\\n    print(f\\\"[OK] 重建 {len(cell_lists)} 個稀疏工作表\\\")\\n\\n    # 5. 在 Markdown 內嵌圖片佔位符 + 圖形文字標註\\n    md_with_images = _inject_image_placeholders(md_text, extracted_images, shape_texts)\\n\\n    # 寫出 .md\\n    md_file = md_dir / (xlsx_path.stem + \\\".md\\\")\\n    md_file.write_text(md_with_images, encoding=\\\"utf-8\\\")\\n    print(f\\\"[OK] Markdown 已寫入：{md_file.name}\\\")\\n\\n    # 6. 產生 metadata.json\\n    metadata = {\\n        \\\"source\\\": xlsx_path.name,\\n        \\\"images\\\": extracted_images,\\n        \\\"shapes\\\": shape_texts,\\n        \\\"merges\\\": merges,\\n    }\\n    meta_file = meta_dir / \\\"metadata.json\\\"\\n    meta_file.write_text(json.dumps(metadata, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding=\\\"utf-8\\\")\\n    print(\\\"[OK] metadata.json 已產生\\\")\\n\\n    print(f\\\"\\\\n完成！輸出在 {output_dir}\\\")\\n    return output_dir\\n\\n\\ndef _inject_image_placeholders(md_text: str, images: list[dict],\\n                               shapes: list[dict] = None) -> str:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"在 Markdown 各 sheet 段落後注入圖片佔位符 + 圖形文字標註區塊\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    shapes = shapes or []\\n    if not images and not shapes:\\n        return md_text\\n\\n    # 按 sheet 分組\\n    img_by_sheet: dict[str, list[dict]] = {}\\n    for img in images:\\n        img_by_sheet.setdefault(img[\\\"sheet\\\"], []).append(img)\\n    shp_by_sheet: dict[str, list[dict]] = {}\\n    for s in shapes:\\n        shp_by_sheet.setdefault(s[\\\"sheet\\\"], []).append(s)\\n\\n    # 在每個 sheet 標題段落後（下個標題前）插入該 sheet 的圖片+標註\\n    lines = md_text.split(\\\"\\\\n\\\")\\n    output_lines = 1. Parse structure definitions to find LocalImageIdentifier field positions
2. Map rich value index to richValueRel positions
3. Map richValueRel positions to rIds
4. Map rIds to media file paths
5. Parse metadata.xml for type index, futureMetadata, and valueMetadata
6. Scan worksheets for cells with vm= attributes and resolve them through the chain
